name: Viva Leisure Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.5640. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.5659 where 7 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.5640, stop A$1.3711, target A$1.5925. Risk/reward is 0.15:1.
